verification_instructions: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compiles without errors
environment_constraints: No test framework configured. Verification is TypeScript compilation only.
key_patterns: Game logic is in src/utils/gameLogic.ts (pure functions that transform GameState). Store in src/store/gameStore.ts dispatches actions that call gameLogic functions. UI components read state from the store. Clan-specific logic is done via player.clanId checks inside game logic functions. Honor track: lower index = higher honor. calculateForce() computes per-province force for a player.
directory_structure: src/utils/gameLogic.ts = all game logic (2319 lines), src/types/game.ts = types and constants, src/store/gameStore.ts = Zustand store, src/components/ = React components
